sigil: A golden wreath on blue, a gold border (Azure, a garland of laurel within a bordure or)
A golden hand on gyronny red and black (Gyronny gules and sable, a hand or)
A yellow field strewn with red ants (Or, semé of ants gules)
Quarterly: An apple tree on yellow, a grey gatehouse on white (Quarterly clockwise, 1st and 3rd or, an apple tree proper, 2nd and 4th argent, a gatehouse cendrée)
A sky-blue falcon soaring against a white moon, on a sky-blue field (Bleu celeste, upon a plate a falcon rousant of the field)
A sky-blue falcon soaring against a white moon, on sky-blue (Bleu celeste, upon a plate a falcon rousant of the field)
A white sun-and-chevron on orange (Tenné, beneath a chevron inverted a sun-in-splendour argent)
A field of silver mockingbirds on green (Vert, semé of mockingbirds argent) Formerly: A grey stone head with fiery eyes, on a light green field (Vert, a stone head cendrée, orbed gules)
Three white plates upon a chevron red on a white field (Argent, on a chevron inverted gules three plates)
A hooded man, black on grey, within a fiery tressure (Cendrée, a hooded man sable within a tressure rayonné along the outer edge gules)
A leaping blue swordfish on fretty silver on white (White fretty silver, a swordfish embowed azure)
A black stag enclosed within a fiery heart on yellow (Or, within a heart enflamed proper a stag sable) Formerly: A crowned black stag on a golden field (Or, a stag crowned sable)

Per pale crimson and gold, a golden lion rampant and a black stag (Per pale gules and or, a lion rampant of the second, a stag sable) Formerly: A crowned black stag on a golden field (Or, a stag crowned sable)
A crowned stag black on a golden field (Or, a stag crowned sable)
Three yellow beehives on a black pale on a field paly black and yellow (Paly or and sable, on a pale of the last three beehives of the first)
Six silver bells on purple, 3-2-1 (Purpure, six bells 3-2-1 argent)
Three blue beetles on gold (Or, three beetles azure)
A black fess on silver (Argent, a fess sable)
A black three-headed dragon, breathing black fire on red (Gules, a dragon thrice-headed sable flammant of the last)
A black vulture with a pink infant in its claws on yellow (Or, a vulture sable clutching an infant carnation)
Vairy green and black (Vairy vert and sable)
A flock of ravens on scarlet surrounding a dead weirwood upon a black escutcheon (Gules, on an escutcheon sable a dead weirwood tree proper, all within an orle of ravens sable)
Maple leaves, green and brown, strewn on a field of yellow (Or, semé of maple leaves vert and brunâtre)
A red bend sinister between two black porcupines on a green (Vert, a bend sinister gules between two porcupines sable)
Vairy orange and blue, upon a black canton, a golden stag beneath an orange bend sinister (Vairy tenné and azure, on a canton sable a stag or debruised by a bend sinister of the first)
A red flayed man on pink de sang
A red flayed man on pink de sang (Carnation gouttée-de-sang, a flayed man gules)
A white spider crab on grey-green (Vert-cendrée, a spider crab argent)
A shoal of silver fish on pale green (Vert semé of fishes argent)
A red stallion upon a golden escutcheon on brown (Brunâtre, on an escutcheon or a stallion rampant gules)
A purple unicorn on silver (Argent, a unicorn purpure)
A red sledgehammer
A black stone bridge with three arches upon a golden chief above three blue pallets on white (Argent, three pallets azure, on a chief or a stone bridge of three arches sable)
A silver helm crested with a sprig of broom on black and green checks (Chequy sable and vert, a helm argent, crested with a sprig of broom proper)
A bear paw, brown on white, within a double tressure brown (Argent, a bear's paw brunâtre within a double tressure of the last)
Three brass buckles on blue (Azure, three buckles or)
A rack of golden antlers on vair (Vair, a stag's attire or)
A bull's skull, bone on blood (Sanguine, a bull's skull argent)
A white knife in a blue pile on white (Argent, on a pile azure a knife of the field)
A green fess embattled on white (Argent, a fess embattled vert)
Undy green, white, and yellow (Barry wavy vert, argent, and or)
Quarterly clockwise, gyronny white and black, a silver axe on green (Quarterly, first and third gyronny white and sable, second and fourth vert, an axe silver)
Fretty blue on white, three silver fish on a blue chief (White fretty azure, on a chief of the second three fish silver)
Two white fawns counter salient on green (Vert, two fawns counter-salient argent)
A golden goose on bendy sinister black and red (Bendy sinister sable and gules, a goose or)
A field of black nightingales on yellow (Or, semé of nightingales sable)
Ten white wolf heads, 4-3-2-1, on grey with a black border (Cendrée, ten wolves erased 4-3-2-1 argent within a bordure sable)
Unknown, but lion(s) are part of it
A yellow centaur with bow on white (Argent, a centaur with bow or)
Red crabs strewn on white (Argent, semé of crabs gules)
A black battle-axe on silver (Argent, a battle-axe sable)
Three sprigs of mistletoe, green and red, on a gold field within a green border (Or, three sprigs of mistletoe vert, fructed gules, within a bordure of the second)
Per bend green and white, a crossed spiked mace and a silver dagger (Per bend vert and white, a mace spiked palewise proper surmounted by a dagger fesswise silver)
A green hand on a gold escutcheon on a green field, a border of red rayonne (Vert, on an escutcheon or a hand of the field all within a bordure rayonny gules)
Three golden bendlets enhanced on white (Argent, three bendlets enhanced or)
Three black dogs running on yellow (Or, three dogs courant sable)
Unknown
Three feathers, red, white and gold, on black (Sable, three feathers in fess gules argent and or)
A silver codfish (A codfish argent)
words: Though All Men Do Despise Us

sigil: A blue pall with white borders on red (Gules, a pall azure, fimbriated argent)
Ten black pellets on scarlet (Gules, ten pellets)
An eagle's head between crossed tridents, red on white (Argent, between two tridents saltirwise gules an eagle's head of the same)
Two griffins combatent countercharged on red and white (Per pale gules and argent, two griffins combatant counterchanged)
Three black ravens in flight holding three red hearts, on white (Argent, three ravens volant sable, each clutching in their claws a heart gules)
Black boots on field of green and gold diamonds (Lozengy vert and or, a pair of boots sable)
Quartered clockwise: a silver chalice on black, a black rose on yellow (Quarterly, first and third sable, a chalice argent, second and fourth or, a rose of the first)
A black and white brindled boar on brown (Brunâtre, a boar brindled sable and argent)
A vee of golden cranes on pale blue (Bleu celeste, cranes in chevron inverted or)
Seven silver coins on a red bend sinister, between two helmets, silver on blue (Azure, on a bend sinister gules seven plates, between two helmets argent)
Ply flame and black (Pily gules and sable)
Six yellow flowers on blue (Azure, six flowers or)
Lemons strewn on purple (Purpure, semé of lemons proper)
Fusily black and gold, 7 white escutcheons upon a red tierce (Fusily sable and or, upon a tierce gules seven escutcheons argent)
A black plowman on brown (Brunâtre, a plowman sable)
A white sword and falling star crossed on lilac (Purpure, a blazing star bendways surmounted by a sword bendways sinister argent)
Per bend a white unicorn on green, a black raven on white (Per bend vert and argent, in sinister chief a unicorn of the second, in dexter base a raven sable)
Forked purple lightning on black field speckled with 4-pointed stars (Sable, semé of mullets of four points, a lightning bolt forked purpure)
A red sun rising from a grey-green sea against a yellow sky (Per fesse wavy or and vert-cendrée, a demi-sun-in-splendour issuant from the line of division gules)
3 black crossbows, on gold, a black border (Or, three crossbows sable within a bordure of the last)
A bone hand, white on red (Gules, a bone hand argent)
Per pale black and pink, a countercharged two-headed pelican (Per pale sable and rose, a pelican bicapitated counterchanged)
A crowned stag black on a golden field (Or, a stag crowned sable)
Two rusted longaxes with black shafts crossed, a black crown between their points, on yellow (Or, two rusted longaxes in saltire proper, hafted sable, between the points a crown of the last)
Quartered clockwise: black and white half-fusily, a wheel of flame on indigo (Quarterly, first and third half-fusily sable and argent, second and fourth purpure, a wheel inflamed proper)
Yellow sun, white crescent moon, and silver star on blue chief above white (White, on a chief azure a moon increscent of the first between a sun-in-splendour or and a mullet silver)
A double pile inverted, stone on pink, a black mullet between (Rose, between two piles inverted cendrée a mullet sable)
A golden heron, beaked and gammed black, standing with a silver fish in its beak, on pink (Rose, a heron close or beaked and membered sable, clasped in its beak a fish argent)
A yellow haystack on orange (Tenné, a haystack or)
A dark green sea turtle on pale green (Vert, a sea-turtle of the field)
A green saltire between four red double-headed eagles on white (Argent, a saltire vert between four eagles bicapitated gules)
A fool in red and gold motley juggling five suns on black (Sable, a fool proper clothed in motley gules and or, juggling five suns-in-splendour of the last)
Three silver ships on blue, a border of crimson and gold (Azure, three galleys argent within a bordure compony gules and or)
Per pale purple and white, two knights combatant with swords, counter-charged (Per pale purpure and argent, two knights combatant counterchanged)

Per fesse: below a black sea with crested line, a black longship, outlined against the setting sun, dark red on orange (Per fess wavy crested tenné and sable, in chief on a demi-guze per fess issuant from the division a longship sailing upon the division of the second)
Per fess, a white crescent moon in the first on black above a green field, a sprucetree line between (Per fess sapiné sable and vert, in canton an increscent argent)
3 black water lilies, on pale violet (Purpure, three water lilies sable)
Per saltire, red and gold checks, a silver and black ferret on green (Per saltire chequy gules and or and vert, in each flank point a ferret argent and sable)
A crowned catfish, spotted grey, on blue (Azure, a catfish cendrée, crowned or)
A grey stone hand upon a white inverted pall on paly black and grey (Paly sable and cendrée on a pall inverted argent a hand couped of the second)

A blue field strewn with whitecaps, on a yellow chief with crested line a pair of blue eyes (Azure semé of whitecaps argent, on a chief wavy crested or two orbs of the second irised of the first and pupiled sable)
A red fox in a circle of blue flowers on ermine (Ermine, a fox gules within an annulet of flowers azure)

Gyronny of twelve red and white; on a gold canton, a two-peaked fool's cap of red and white with silver bells (Gyronny of twelve gules and white, on a canton or a fool’s cap peaked once of the first and once of the second with bells silver)
A copper dagger across a black chevron on white (Argent, a chevron inverted sable, surmounted by a dagger copper)
A field of silver caltrops on black (Sable, semé of caltrops argent)
A white ironwood tree with a black sword on it, pointing down, on a black field (Sable, on an ironwood argent a sword palewise to base of the field)
A red apple on gold (Or, an apple gules)
A green apple on gold (Or, an apple vert)
A hooded blue hawk on silver (Argent, a hooded hawk azure)
Unknown
Two blue towers, united by a bridge, on a silver-grey field (Cendrée, a bridge azure, at either end a tower of the same)
Two blue towers on silver-grey (Cendrée, a bridge azure, at either end a tower of the same)
A green hand on white (Argent, a hand vert)
A red cockatrice with black snake in beak on gold (Or, a cockatrice gules, in its beak a serpent sable)
Three grey owls upon white plates on green (Vert, three plates, each charged with an owl cendrée)
Three black lances upright on pink, between black flaunches (Rose, three lances palewise in fess sable between two flaunches of the last)
A silver fist on scarlet (Gules, a mailed fist argent)
A blue wavy bend on gold (Or, a bend wavy azure)
A gold-banded black warhorn on red (Gules, a warhorn sable banded or)
Nine yellow trefoils on a black cross on ermine (Ermine, on a cross sable nine trefoils or)
The Mother's face upon white pale wavy dividing a brown field (Brunâtre, on a pale wavy argent the Mother’s head caboshed proper)
A burning tower in yellow, within a black pile, upon flaming red (Gules, on a pile sable a tower or with flames issuant from the battlements)
A black sleeping lion on yellow (Or, a lion dormant sable)
Green and white gyronny, a double-headed eagle counter-charged, gold beak and talons (Gyronny vert and argent, an eagle bicapitated counterchanged armed or)
A double tressure white on green (Vert, a double-tressure argent)
Three red martlets on white bend, on blue (Azure, on a bend argent three martlets gules)
The sea king's head, white with dark green seaweed beard and hair, a black crown on a grey field (Cendrée, the sea king’s head argent bearded and crined with seaweed vert crowned sable)
A golden kraken on black (Sable, a kraken or)
An iron escutcheon with silver studs on a grey-green field strewn with longships proper (Vert-cendrée semé of longships proper, an escutcheon cendrée platé)
A black pitchfork on a golden bar sinister on russet (Brunâtre, on a bend sinister or a pitchfork sable)
An erminois maunch on pink, an erminois border (Rose, a maunch erminois within a bordure of the last)
3 blue moons, waxing, full, waning, on a white bend, on blue (Azure, on a bend argent a hurt between an increscent and decrescent of the first)
A field of red and white diamonds (Lozengy argent and gules)
Quartered clockwise: a silver scythe on black, a peacock on cream (Quarterly, 1st and 3rd sable, a scythe argent, 2nd and 4th carnation, a peacock in his pride proper)
Per bend black and silver, two scythes countercharged (Per bend sable and argent, two scythes counterchanged)
A silver scythe on pale blue (Bleu celeste, a scythe argent)
A silver scythe on black within an embattled border (Sable, a scythe within a bordure embattled argent)
A silver scythe on black (Sable, a scythe argent)
A silver tree on green (Vert, a tree argent)
Per bend sinister orange and sable rayonne, a castle countercharged (Per bend sinister rayonné tenné and sable, a castle counterchanged)
Three red hart's heads caboshed on a white bend on vair (Vair, on a bend argent three harts’ heads caboshed gules)
Barry olive and ivory (Barry vert and argent)
A white bend cotised on purple (Purpure, a bend cotised argent)
White sea birds strewn on a blue field (Azure, semé of seabirds argent)
A ring of black thorns and a ring of pink flowers, interlocked, on green (Vert, an annulet of thorns sable embracing another of flowers rose)
Green fretty over gold, a green pale wavy (Or fretty vert, a pale wavy of the second)
A yellow rooster's head with red comb, within a white escutcheon, on red (Gules, on an escutcheon argent, a cock's head or, combed of the field)
A white winged chalice on pink (Rose, a winged-chalice argent)
An oak spoon within a white cartouche on orange and black lozengy (Lozengy tenné and sable, on a cartouche argent an oak spoon proper)
An oaken escutcheon studded with iron, a field bendy of undulating blue and white (Bendy undy azure and argent, an escutcheon brunâtre platé)
A white tower topped with flames on smoke grey (Cendrée, a tower argent, beacon inflamed gules)

Per saltire: two heavy silver chains crossing between (clockwise) a gold longship on black, a dark green pine on white, a cluster of red grapes on gold, and a black raven flying in a blue sky (Per saltire sable, azure, white and or, two chains throughout saltirewise silver between in chief a longship or, in dexter a raven volant sable, in sinister a pine-tree vert and in base a bunch of grapes gules)
Barry red and pink, three golden crowns on a blue chief (Barry gules and rose, on a chief azure three crowns or)
A brown bullmoose with black antlers on orange (Tenné, a bullmoose brunâtre attired sable)
Per chevron engrailed grey and bone, 3 death's head moths countercharged (Per chevron engrailed cendrée and argent, three death's head moths counterchanged)
A brown deer, bound and slung on a pole, on white (Argent, on a pole fesswise proper a deer bound and slung brunâtre)
Five silver arrows, fanned, on brown (Brunâtre, a sheaf of five arrows, points to chief, argent)
Two red bendlets on gold, a red hand below pointing to a red sun above (Or, two bendlets between in base dexter a hand pointing to chief sinister, and in chief sinister a sun-in-splendour gules)
A bend sinister, checked black and white, on pale grey (Cendrée, a bend sinister chequy sable and argent)
A black sword upright between four black horseshoes on gold, a grey-green border (Or, between four horseshoes a sword erect sable all within a bordure vert-cendrée)
An inverted pall between 3 lion's heads, yellow on black (Sable, a pall reversed between three lions erased or)
A golden quill on checkered dark and light green (Chequy vert and vert of a paler variety, a quill or)
Golden scales on white, a double tressure blue (Argent, a pair of balances or within a double-tressure azure)
A white sunburst on black (Sable, a sunburst argent)

Quarterly of nine: a white fish on grey, a golden fish hook on white (Quarterly of nine, first, third, fifth, seventh and ninth cendrée, a fish white; second, fourth, sixth and eight white, a fish-hook or)
A black book bound in bronze, locked, upon a pale blue field (Bleu celeste, a book sable clasped and garnished bronze)
The storm god's cloudly hand, pale grey, yellow lightning flashing from the fingertips, on black (Sable, the storm god’s hand nebuly cendrée, issuant from its fingertips lightning bolts or)
Four sunbursts countercharged on quartered orange and black (Quarterly tenné and sable, four suns-in-splendour counterchanged)
A black kettle on red, a border of pellets (Gules, a kettle sable within an orle of pellets)
Pale green ivy bendy on black masonry (Sable masoned proper bendy of ivy leaves vert)
A brown fret on white (Argent, a fret brunâtre)
Per fess undy: A crown of white stars on burgundy above black (Per fess undy murrey and sable, in chief mullets arranged in a crown argent)
Quarterly clockwise, a gold lion on a crimson field; a black plowman on a brown field (Quarterly, first and third gules, a lion or, second and fourth brunâtre, a plowman sable)
A roaring lion, gold on crimson (Gules, a lion or)
A golden inverted pile on sky blue, a yellow sun in the first (Bleu celeste, a pile reversed golden, in canton a sun-in-splendor yellow)
Three black thunderbolts on orange (Tenné, three thunderbolts sable)
Per pale white and green, a fir tree line between, three brown pinecones on the white (Per pale sapiné argent and vert, in dexter three pinecones brunâtre)
A line of white footprints in bend sinister, on dark brown (Brunâtre, a trail of footprints bendwise sinister argent)
Two large pink lips, on a dark blue field (Azure, a pair of lips carnation)
Bronze crossed keys on a white pale on purple (Purpure, on a pale argent two keys saltirewise bronze)
Three oaken barrels on white (Argent, three oaken barrels proper)
Quartered of six: red lips strewn on yellow, yellow skulls strewn on black (Quarterly of six or semé of lips gules, sable semé of skulls or)
A black manticore on white, beneath a crimson chief with three gold coins (Argent, a manticore sable, on a chief gules three bezants)
A black bat on per bend silver and gold (Per bend argent and or, a bat sable)
A silver dolphin on a blue-green field (Aquamarine, a dolphin argent)
Per bend sinister: a grey cat's face on black, a brown jug on white (Per bend sinister, in chief dexter sable, a cat’s head caboshed cendrée, in base sinister argent, a jug brunâtre)
Orange and white gyronny, a black talon (Gyronny tenné and argent, an eagle's leg erased sable)
A white badger on per pale green and brown (Per pale vert and brunâtre, a badger argent)
A black field strewn wriggling green serpents (Sable, semé of snakes vert)
A green lobster on white, its claws holding a black harpoon (Argent, a lobster vert holding a harpoon sable)
Six white mullets 3-2-1 on violet (Purpure, six mullets argent)
A silver eagle displayed on indigo (Purpure, an eagle displayed argent)
A white merman with dark green hair, beard and tail, carrying a black trident, on a blue-green field (Aquamarine, a merman argent crined, bearded and queued vert, carrying a trident sable)
A red sea lion between two black pallets on white (Argent, between two pallets sable a sea-lion gules)
A white skull crowned with gold on black (Sable, a skull argent crowned or)
A burning tree, orange on smoke (Cendrée, a tree tenné in flame)
10 frogs, 4-3-2-1, green on yellow (Or, ten frogs 4-3-2-1 vert)
A red sun pierced by a golden spear on orange (Tenné, a sun-in-splendour gules transfixed by a spear or) Formerly: a golden spear on orange (Tenné, a spear or)
A triple spiral; red, green and blue, on white (Argent, a triple gurges gules, vert and azure)
A border of flowers of many colors and varieties on green (Vert, an orle of flowers variegated)
A rusty anchor on turquoise beneath yellow chief with three blue plates (Aquamarine, a rusted anchor, on a chief or three hurts)
Twining waterspouts, green on white (Argent, waterspouts intertwining vert)

A golden horn of plenty spilling out apples, carrots, plums, onions, leeks, turnips, and fruits of many colors on a white field bordered in gold (Argent, a cornucopia or overflowing with apples, carrots, plums, onions, leeks, turnips and fruits variegated all proper within a bordure of the second)
A white great horned owl on grey (Cendrée, a great-horned-owl argent)
Quarterly, a black saltire on yellow, green and white diamonds (Quarterly clockwise, first and third or, a saltire sable, second and fourth lozengy vert and argent)
A pine tree covered with snow in a pale green pile, on white (Argent, upon a pile vert a pine tree of the field)
Three bronze spearheads on white, a bronze border embattled (Argent, three spearheads bronze within a bordure embattled of the last)
A red salmon on white, a gold tressure (Argent, a salmon gules within a tressure or)
Per pale barry: russet and green (Per pale barry brunâtre and vert)
A black bear in a green wood (Barry sapiné vert and vert of a paler variety, a bear sable)
A black crow in flight on storm-green (Vert, a crow volant sable)
A bend orange on vairy grey and green (Vairy cendrée and vert, a bend tenné)
A golden crown studded with emeralds on a red-brown field (Brunâtre, an ancient crown or studded with emeralds proper)
Black-and-orange butterflies on white (Argent, semé of butterflies sable and tenné)
Quarterly: A golden pavilion on a blue field, a green laurel crown on a white field (Quarterly clockwise, first and fourth, azure, a pavilion or, second and third, argent, a garland of laurel vert)
A spotted tree cat, yellow and black, on mud brown (Brunâtre, a treecat or pelleté)
10 nooses, 4-3-2-1, black on white with a border of blood (Argent, ten nooses 4-3-2-1 sable within a bordure sanguine)
A cross embattled, black on white (Argent, a cross embattled sable)
Six green thistles, 3-2-1, on yellow (Or, six thistles 3-2-1 vert)
A flight of flaming arrows rising bendwise on a blue field (Azure, a flight of arrows bendwise points to chief dexter inflamed proper)
Three green oak leaves on gold (Or, three oak leaves vert)
Ten white hands on green, 4-3-2-1, beneath a red bend sinister (Vert, 10 hands 4-3-2-1 argent debruised by a bend sinister gules)
Dark green pines strewn closely together on yellow (Or semé of pines vert)
Per fess: three golden harps on black, gold and silver bendy sinister (Per fess, in chief sable, three harps or, in base bendy sinister of the second and argent)
A lion, checkered green and gold, on white (Argent, a lion chequy vert and or)
A checked silver and gold fess on black (Sable, a fess chequy argent and or)
Twining red-and-white snakes on black (Sable, two serpents argent and gules entwined)
Per saltire: burgundy and white stripes, a black lion's head on gold (Per saltire, the first paly gules and argent, the second or, a lion erased sable)
Checkered purple and white, within each square a golden coin (Chequy purpure and argent, each chequer charged with a bezant)
Three black castles on orange (Tenné, three castles sable)
A pea pod burst open, green on white, bordered by three rows of green peas (Argent, a pea pod open within a bordure of three rows of peas vert)
Ten mullets, 4-3-2-1, purple on yellow (Or, ten mullets 4-3-2-1 purpure)
White crossed quills on russet (Brunâtre, two quills saltirewise argent)
A dancing maiden pink in a swirl of white silk, on blue (Azure, a maiden dancing carnation enwrapped with silk argent)
Three purple roundels, on a gold field (Or, three golpes)

Per bend sinister, three red hearts and three gold lions on white, a broken sword silver on purple (Per bend sinister white and purpure, three lions or each clutching a heart gules, a broken sword silver)
A red pomegranate on white, a double tressure red (Argent, a pomegranate within a double tressure gules)
A blue plate on white, with a grey tressure (Argent, a hurt within a tressure cendrée)
A red ox on ermine (Ermine, an ox gules)
A partial eclipse, black moon over yellow sun, on dusty pink (Rose, a sun-in-splendour or partially surmounted by a moon in her complement sable)
A grey iron greathelm on white (Argent, an iron greathelm cendrée)
A flaming saltire, red and yellow, between 4 white skulls, on black (Sable, a saltire rayonné gules and or, between four skulls argent)
Three black scorpions on red (Gules, three scorpions sable)
A white ram's head with golden horns on red (Gules, a ram's head cabossed argent attired or)
A golden flagon on burgundy, a border of gold and white checks (Murrey, a flagon or within a bordure chequy of the second and argent)
A red castle on a white field within a red embattled border (Argent, a castle within a bordure embattled gules)
A burgundy grape cluster on blue (Azure, a grape-cluster murrey)
A black lizard-lion on grey-green (Vert-cendrée, a lizard-lion sable)
A red lion rampant regardant with a forked tail, armed and langued gold, on silver (Argent, a lion rampant regardant queue-fourché gules, armed and langued or)
An oaken door banded with iron, in a grey stone doorway, on black masonry (Sable masoned proper, an door brunâtre banded cendrée within a stone doorway of the last)

A black knight on a black rearing horse on white, bearing a golden lance and a white shield, upon which is seen the above in miniature (Argent, a knight mounted upon a horse forcené sable bearing a lance or and a shield of the field itself charged with the whole)
Nine unicorns around a maze, silver on black (Sable, a maze argent within an annulet of nine unicorns of the last)
Six roundels fountain, 3-2-1, on grey (Cendrée, six fountains 3-2-1)
A two-headed horse, brown, on a field of wavy green and green (Wavy vert and vert, a horse bicapitated brunâtre)
Three red chevronels on ermine (Ermine, three chevronels inverted gules)
A golden tree on silver (Argent, a tree or)
A saltire of interlocked golden rings, upon a sky blue field (Bleu celeste, per saltire a chain of rings or)

A black portcullis over a white crescent moon on purple bordered with runes on bronze (Purpure, a moon increscent argent surmounted by a portcullis sable, all within a bordure bronze charged with ancient runes of the third)
Black iron studs on bronze, bordered with rune (Bronze pelleté, a bordure of ancient runes)
Five black starfish on a gold pale, on pean (Pean, on a pale or five starfish sable)
An orange bend engrailed on black (Sable, a bend tenné engrailed)
A weeping willow, green on white (Argent, a willow-tree vert)
Two black warhammers crossed on a white saltire on blue (Azure, on a saltire argent two warhammers saltirewise sable)
A black horse's head, eyes and mane red, on bronze within a black engrailed border (Bronze, a horse's head sable orbed and maned gules within a bordure engrailed sable)
A nine-headed serpent, black on silver (Argent, a serpent nine-headed sable)
Per bend sinister blue and white, a spotted leopard with golden axe (Per bend sinister azure and argent, a spotted-leopard proper bearing an axe or)
A green arrow on white bend on green (Vert, on a bend argent an arrow of the field)
A broken silver sword on red (Gules, a broken sword argent)
words: Family is Hope, Protect it Always

sigil: A black ship, an onion proper on its sail, on pale grey (Cendrée, a ship sable, its sail charged with an onion proper)
Three stalks of yellow wheat on brown (Brunâtre, three stalks of wheat or)
A peacock in his pride on cream (Carnation, a peacock in his pride proper)
A white rose upon a red escutcheon upon white, a red embattled border (Argent, an escutcheon gules charged with a rose of the first all within a bordure embattled of the second)
Per fess: blue red green above, a white catfish on black below (Per fess, the first tierced in pale azure, gules and vert, the second sable, a catfish argent)
A field of copper nails on blue, a copper border rayonne (Azure semé of nails within a bordure rayonny copper)
Three golden wings, bendwise, on checkered white and black (Chequy argent and sable, in bend three wings bendwise or)
Nine white seagulls on a field of brown (Brunâtre, nine seagulls proper)
Pale grey, a double tressure white (Cendrée, a double tressure argent)
Per pale, white stars strewn on indigo, an orange sun on yellow (Per pale, in dexter purpure semé of mullets argent, in sinister or, a sun-in-splendour tenné)
﻿A bloody spear, gold on black﻿﻿﻿, with a border of checkered gold and black (Sable, a spear or tipped sanguine, a bordure chequy or and sable)
Six brown acorns, 3-2-1, on yellow (Or, six acorns 3-2-1 brunâtre)
Oak saltire on blue (Azure, a saltire brunâtre)
3 pepperpots on a saffron bend, upon green and silver stripes (Paly vert and argent, three pepperpots proper on a bend tenné)
Crossed black spears on checkered silver and gold (Chequy argent and or, two spears in saltire sable)
A black dagger piercing a red heart on white de sang within an undulating red border (Argent goutté-de-sang, a heart gules transfixed by a dagger sable, all within a bordure wavy of the second)
A driftwood tree, bare and brown, on pale green (Vert, a driftwood tree blasted brunâtre)
A running grey direwolf, on an ice-white field (Argent, a direwolf courant cendrée)
Two black wings upon a white fess on checkered black and grey (Chequy sable and cendrée, on a fess argent two wings of the first)
A white lamb holding a golden goblet on a green field (Vert, a lamb proper holding a goblet or)
A black brazier on a grey masonry field (Cendrée masoned proper, a brazier sable)
A bare stone tree, grey on black (Sable, a stone tree blasted cendrée)
Chevronny russet and gold (Chevronny inverted brunâtre and or)
A tripartite pale, blue, red, and green on white (Argent, a pale tierced per pale azure, gules, and vert)
A flying pig
Three women's heads, white with black hair, on blue and green undy (Barry wavy azure and vert, three women's heads argents, crined sable)

A drowned man, pink and pale, floating upright in a blue-green sea, his hair streaming upwards, as fish nibble at his limbs (Aquamarine, a drowned man erect carnation, hair to chief, fishes proper nibbling at his limbs)
Seven golden seven-pointed stars in a ring on white (Argent, seven mullets of seven points or)
Battling swans black and white, beaks and feet golden, on per pale white and black (Per pale argent and sable, two swans combatant counterchanged, beaked and membered or)
A blue bantam rooster on yellow (Or, a cock azure)
A white scroll with gold knobs on purple, a white tressure (Purpure a scroll argent, knobbed or, within a tressure of the second)
Three sentinel trees, green on brown (Brunâtre, three sentinel trees vert)
A 7-pointed star, countercharged, on gyronny silver and blue (Gyronny argent and azure, a star of seven points counterchanged)
A red three-headed dragon, breathing red fire on black (Sable, a dragon thrice-headed gules flammant of the last)
A striding red huntsman on green (Vert, a huntsman striding gules)
Quartered: yellow suns and white crescents on rose and azure (Quarterly clockwise, 1st and 3rd rose, a sun-in-splendour or, 2nd and 4th azure, a moon increscent argent)
A scourge of nettles, red and black, on white (Argent, a scourge sable lashed with nettles gules)
A golden trident upright on black between two golden flanches (Sable, between two flaunches a trident palewise or)
Nine stars, one of 7 points and the rest of 6 points, on a gold saltire on black (Sable, on a saltire or, nine mullets of the field, that in fesse-point of seven points, all others of six points)
Per saltire purple and gold, four hawks' heads countercharged (Per saltire purpure and or, four hawks erased counterchanged)
A bronze disk surrounded with red flames on a white field (Argent, a roundel bronze inflamed gules)
A silver flail on red within a black border rayonne (Gules, a flail argent within a bordure rayonne sable)
A green dragon biting its tail on gold (Or, a dragon biting its tail vert) Formerly: a ghost
Pily grey and black (Pily cendrée and sable)
Five black towers on white, a double tressure red and black (Argent, five towers sable within a double-tressure, the outer gules and the inner of the second)
A winged heart, black on gold, within a black bordure embattled (Or, a heart with wings within a bordure embattled sable)
A hanged man, black on blue (Azure, a hanged man sable)
A brown tortoise within a yellow lozenge on green (Vert, on a lozenge or a tortoise brunâtre)
A leaping trout, silver, on a field of blue and mud red (Paly wavy azure and gules, a trout embowed argent)
9 strawberries on a white saltire, on green and red vairy in point (Vairy-in-point vert and gules, on a saltire argent nine strawberries proper)
Two golden roses on green (Vert, two roses or)
A golden rose on green (Vert, a rose or)
Oak and iron paly, beneath a white chief with seven green hands (Paly brunâtre and cendrée, on a chief argent seven hands vert)
Rayonne yellow over crimson (Per fess rayonny or and gules)
A roaring giant, brown-haired and wearing a skin, with broken silver chains, on flame-red (Gules, a giant roaring brunâtre habited with a skin proper wearing chains broken argent)
A cresting wave, sea green on black (Sable, a wave cresting aquamarine)
Three black leopards standing on a yellow pile on orange (Tenné, on a pile or three leopards statant sable)
Quartered: a green dragon on white, a white tower on black (Quarterly, 1st and 3rd argent, a dragon vert, 2nd and 4th sable, a tower argent)
Quartered: a black dragon on white, two golden eyes in a golden ring on black (Quarterly clockwise, 1st and 3rd argent, a dragon sable, 2nd and 4th sable, a two orbs or within an annulet of the last)
A white weasel on ermines (Ermines, a weasel argent)
A silver seahorse on sea green (Aquamarine, a seahorse argent)
words: The Old, the True, the Brave

sigil: Quarterly: a red boar's head on white, beneath a gold bend sinister a silver lion rampant regardant with a forked tail, armed and langued gold, on red (Quarterly clockwise, 1st and 3rd white, a boar erased gules, 2nd and 4th gules, a lion rampant regardant queue-forché silver, armed and langued or, debruised by a bend sinister of the last)
A black leviathan on a grey sea (Cendrée, a leviathan sable)
A black toad on white lily pad, on green (Vert, a toad sable atop a lilypad argent)
A silver wyvern within a red double tressure on sable (Sable, a wyvern argent within a double tressure gules)
Five yellow mascles on green (Vert, five mascles in fess or)
Brown crossed oars on white, between a pair of blue flaunches (Argent, between two flaunches azure as many oars saltirewise brunâtre)
Six candles, white with red flames, within silver candle holders on a grey field bordered in black (Cendrée, six candles white in holders argent inflamed gules, within a bordure sable)
Four wheels countercharged on quartered field blue and white (Quarterly azure and argent, four wheels counterchanged)
A black broken wheel on green (Vert, a broken-wheel sable)
A white and spotted-red spider upon a silver web over black (Sable, a cobweb silver thereon a spider argent spotted gules)
Per fess: five black roundels on grey over green and white lozengy (Per fess cendrée and lozengy argent and vert, in chief five pellets)

A green engrailed pall, inverted on white, dividing three trees, green, red and bare (Argent, a pall reversed engrailed vert between three trees proper, in chief dexter veined of the second, in chief sinister veined gules and in base blasted)
Two golden trumpets crossed on blue, a gold chief with three black stags (Azure, two trumpets saltirewise or, on a chief of the second three stags sable)
Two green bars gemmel on gold (Or, two bars-gemels vert)
Six white seashells on sand (Carnation, six escallops argent)
A black dog on blue (Azure, a dog sable)
Nine black bats, 4-3-2, on yellow (Or, nine bats 4-3-2 sable)
A white pile inverted on indigo, an arch of 4-pointed stars above (Azure, a pile inverted Argent beneath mullets of four points embowed)
A white pile inverted on indigo, an arch of 4-pointed stars above (Purpure, above a pile inverted mullets of four points in fess enarched argent)
3 silver longswords crossed on black beneath a dragonbone skeleton on a white chief (Sable, three longswords crossed silver, on a chief white a dragonbone skeleton proper)
Three white hedgehogs on yellow (Or, three hedgehogs argent)
Unknown
A red pall on a field of oak (Brunâtre, a pall gules)
Three woolsacks, white on purple, a white border (Purpure, three woolsacks within a bordure argent)
Three wooden buckets, brown on blue, with a border of grey and white checks (Azure, three wooden buckets brunâtre within a bordure chequy cendrée and argent)

5 splintered lances, 3-2, striped blue and white with blue pennons, on yellow, beneath a white chief bearing a red castle, a green viper, a black broken wheel, a purple unicorn and a golden lion (Yellow, five broken lances, 3-2, striped azure and argent, pennons of the second, on a chief of the third, a wheel broken sable between, on the dexter, a castle gules and snake vert, and, on the sinister, a unicorn purpure and lion or)
A black adder biting a heel on yellow (Or, a human heel proper being bitten by an adder sable)
A blue-green maelstrom on gold (Or, a gurges aquamarine)
Bloody moon on purple (Purpure, a moon proper tipped sanguine)
A grey squirrel on white with a red border (Argent, a squirrel cendrée within a bordure gules)
2 bronze halberds crossed between 4 red diamonds, on white (Argent, between four lozenges gules two halberds saltirewise bronze)
Barry green and gold, a black battering ram with a gold head on a white chief (Barry vert and or, on a chief argent a battering-ram sable headed of the second)
A golden longbow on white between two crimson flaunches (Argent, a longbow or between two flaunches gules)
A black portcullis grill over sand (Carnation, a portcullis sable)
